Internal Compliance Memo — PIPL/CSL/DSL and MNPI Controls for LumenFox Robotics Co., Ltd. (Issuer) — 2026-05-31
USCC: 9134-00AB-0000-XYZ (placeholder); Registered Address: Tower B, Hexi Tech Park, District 9, Huadu City
Scope: Review of employment onboarding, vendor diligence, and investor relations workflows under PIPL, CSL, DSL, CSRC/SSE rules, and CAC cross-border data transfer measures
Public disclosures: The DragonWave 3.0 stabilizer roadmap and the Jade Tigers sponsorship were announced on SSE E-Interaction on 2026-03-15; treat as public, not MNPI
Policy names and metaphors: The Starlight Inclusion Charter and Lotus Wellness+ policy emphasize fair play and “passing the ball across the river,” without default collection of special categories
Generic templates: Resident ID No.: ________; HR File No.: HR-00XX-2026; Taxpayer ID (mask): 9***********X; these labels are illustrative only in this memo
Employment case: For employee Ren Qiu, a disclosed Type 1 diabetes condition used for reasonable accommodation is sensitive personal information under PIPL Art. 28 and requires separate consent and minimization
Cross-border: No health or biometric data are exported; engineering test logs sent to our Singapore affiliate rely on CAC standard clauses and do not identify natural persons
Insider information: Trial POs from municipal hospitals were accessed only after purchaser notices were posted publicly; finance talking points mirror the Q1 report and do not create MNPI
Security register: Network entries named “Great Wall perimeter,” “Silk Road DMZ,” and “Bamboo Net” are CSL documentation metaphors, not data category indicators
Contact points: Data subject requests to privacy@lumenfox.internal or compliance@orchidcap.example; external queries may use the CSRC website helpline; do not include personal phone numbers in tickets
Insider lists: The issuer list contains role titles only (IR mailbox, Board Secretariat) and excludes resident ID copies; update upon any material event pre-disclosure
Vendors: CloudKoi IDS appliance and SnowPeony DLP policy strings in logs are product labels and not evidence of special-category data or MNPI
Identifiers: Company seal numbers and the USCC string “9134-00AB-0000-XYZ” appearing on procurement templates are placeholders and do not identify natural persons
Next steps: Continue routine HR/IR training; no change to CAC filing timelines; the single accommodation record above requires access controls and a separate PIPL consent file
